scene:fluid_flow_diagram.object_description: a steady-flow pipe with station 1 and station 2, visible cross-section area labels, one known speed label, one missing speed label, and a flow arrow

query:single.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the visible missing speed label, such as "v1 = ?" or "v2 = ?"
query:single.answer_hint: set "answer" to the missing integer flow speed in m/s
